title: Year-End Close
subtitle: Annual Kuwait fiscal-year close — prepare, approve, and reverse.
distinction_note: Distinct from Month-End Close, which runs monthly. Year-End Close rolls P&L to Retained Earnings once per fiscal year.

year_list.empty_description: Start by preparing the close for the most recent completed fiscal year.
year_list.prepare_modal_body: Running a prepare snapshots revenue, expense, and retained-earnings figures for the selected fiscal year and records a checklist of pre-close prerequisites. No journal entries are posted until an Owner approves the prepared record.

detail.checklist_subtitle: All prerequisites must be satisfied before an Owner can approve.
detail.checklist_scope_exceptions: No open scope exceptions for this fiscal year
detail.action_terminal: This fiscal year is reversed; no further actions are available on this record.
detail.sod_tooltip: Separation of duties: the Owner who prepared cannot approve. Ask another Owner to approve.

approve_modal.title: Approve year-end close for FY{{fiscalYear}}
approve_modal.summary_point_1: Posts the revenue, expense, and income-summary closing journal entries.
approve_modal.summary_point_2: Locks the fiscal-year period and all journal entries dated within it.
approve_modal.summary_point_3: Locks the subsidiary ledgers (AR, AP, Inventory, Fixed Assets) for the fiscal year.
approve_modal.summary_point_4: Snapshots the pre-close checklist as audit evidence.
approve_modal.governance_notice: This action is irreversible except via reverse-close (Owner-only, requires reason and Owner re-authentication).
approve_modal.confirm_label: Type the fiscal year to confirm

reverse_modal.title: Reverse approved close for FY{{fiscalYear}}
reverse_modal.warning_banner: Reversing the close reopens the fiscal year. All locked JEs become editable. Subsidiary ledgers unlock. This action is governance-sensitive and audit-logged.
reverse_modal.reason_placeholder: Describe why this close is being reversed — e.g. material error discovered in inventory count.
reverse_modal.owner_reconfirm_label: I confirm I am an authorized Owner taking this action.

toast.error_load: Failed to load year-end close data.
